title: Honorary Finance Secretary (SMU Ultimate Frisbee)
body: Executive Committee for SMU Ultimate Frisbee
detail:
• Managed club budgeting, cashflow tracking, stakeholder management and reimbursement processes
to ensure smooth operations for trainings and club activities.
• Planned, budgeted and executed SMU Ultimate Frisbee Club’s flagship annual ultimate frisbee
tournament with ~300 attendees.

title: Deputy Director of Finance (SMU Waikiki 2025)
body: Organising committee for Waikiki 2025, SMU Sports Union’s flagship annual beach event
detail:
• Oversaw budgeting and expense control for SMU Sports Union’s flagship annual beach event with
~1000 attendees.
• Managed ticketing systems, vendor payments, and post-event financial reconciliation.
